sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed 1-2-1 / 2-4-2 / 1-2-1 coefficients and divide-by-16 normalization.
sub_modules.unsharp_subtract: Combinational pointwise high-frequency extraction: original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.unsharp_gain_scale: Combinational pointwise signed scaling of the high-frequency component by the runtime gain.
sub_modules.unsharp_reconstruct: Combinational pointwise reconstruction: original plus scaled high-frequency component.
sub_modules.pixel_saturate: Combinational output clamp to the configured unsigned pixel range.
